## Overview

**Name:** Marcus Walker
**Role:** Software Engineer II
**Team:** Platform

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Joined September 2024 — still learning the codebase and team norms
- Responds well to clear deadlines and structured tasks
- Needs written follow-ups after verbal agreements — struggles to track action items in-flight
- Prefers 1:1 feedback over team-channel call-outs (had an incident early on)
- Direct but not blunt — catches sarcasm as criticism

## Pending Feedback

> Undelivered observations with coaching-tone talking points. Cleared when delivered.

- [2026-03-25] **Slipping commitments** — discussed April 10 session, partially resolved. Keep watching. Don't revisit unless it happens again.
- [2026-04-07] **Scope-cut discomfort** — open by saying you noticed he went quiet when the scope cut came up. Don't frame as a weakness. Ask if the cut felt like his failure or like a reasonable response to the blocker. Connect to the fact that good engineers cut scope; it's not a concession.
